'''savata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oofamily|oofamily]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-v-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oofamily|oofamily]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| savata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sævætæth|sævætæth]] || [[word:sævætæj|sævætæj]] || [[word:sævætæsh|sævætæsh]] || [[word:sævætæ|sævætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:savavatath|savavatath]] || [[word:savavataj|savavataj]] || [[word:savavatash|savavatash]] || [[word:savavata|savavata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:savatath|savatath]] || [[word:savataj|savataj]] || [[word:savatash|savatash]] || [[word:savata|savata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:savaftath|savaftath]] || [[word:savaftaj|savaftaj]] || [[word:savaftash|savaftash]] || [[word:savaftaf|savaftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:savatatha|savatatha]] || [[word:savataja|savataja]] || [[word:savatasha|savatasha]] || [[word:savataka|savataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:savatath|savatath]] || [[word:savataj|savataj]] || [[word:savatash|savatash]] || [[word:savata|savata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:savatathal|savatathal]] || [[word:savatajal|savatajal]] || [[word:savatashal|savatashal]] || [[word:savatakal|savatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:savatathatha|savatathatha]] || [[word:savatajaja|savatajaja]] || [[word:savatashasha|savatashasha]] || [[word:savataka|savataka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:savatathan|savatathan]] || [[word:savatajan|savatajan]] || [[word:savatashan|savatashan]] || [[word:savatakan|savatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:savatathaoro|savatathaoro]] || [[word:savatajaoro|savatajaoro]] || [[word:savatashaoro|savatashaoro]] || [[word:savatakaoro|savatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
